steps.title: Find the decisive evidence about Thailand
steps.content: The farm-size transition hypothesis predicts that modernization drives consolidation into larger farms. The decisive evidence is Promkhambut et al.'s finding: Thai rice farms modernized without consolidating—they adopted modern methods while remaining small.

steps.title: Match the prediction to the choices
steps.content: Choice D identifies what the hypothesis predicts (shift to large-scale farming) and shows it didn't happen in Thailand—farms remained small despite modernizing, per Promkhambut et al. The other three either misrepresent the sources (B says farms expanded), ignore Thailand (C), or lack specificity (A). That matches choice D — D is correct.
